blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,664 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
